exampleSentencesTranslated: He put the table in the middle of the living room so everyone could see it easily.
She sat in the middle of her two close friends when they went to the movies last night.
Please put this book in the middle of the two notebooks on the table.

translation.en: We will meet in the park.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau ___ công viên.

notes:
giữa means in the middle or between. It’s used to show position between two things or in the center of a space.

It’s a preposition, so it comes before a noun.  

You can use it for physical space or abstract things like time and relationships. Close synonym: ở giữa (more explicit “in the middle”). Opposites that help: ngoài (outside), đầu / cuối (beginning / end).
exampleSentences: Anh đặt cái bàn ở giữa phòng khách để mọi người dễ nhìn thấy.
Chị ngồi giữa hai người bạn thân khi đi xem phim tối qua.
Em hãy để quyển sách này ở giữa hai quyển vở trên bàn nhé.
notes_md:
**giữa** means *in the middle* or *between*. It’s used to show position between two things or in the center of a space.

It’s a preposition, so it comes before a noun.  

You can use it for physical space or abstract things like time and relationships. Close synonym: **ở giữa** (more explicit “in the middle”). Opposites that help: **ngoài** (outside), **đầu / cuối** (beginning / end).

example.en: I am standing between two people.
example.es: Estoy de pie entre dos personas.

definitions.es: En el medio o centro de algo.
definitions.en: In the middle or center of something.
definitions.vi: Ở giữa hoặc trung tâm của một cái gì đó.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau ___ công viên.

translation.en: We will meet in the park.
